options: They need less training data than other methods.
They’re easier to explain and understand than other models.
They can learn complex details from the data on their own.
They work faster and are more efficient computationally.

questions.questionText: Which algorithm is best suited for a binary classification problem?
What is the key difference between supervised and unsupervised learning?
options: Supervised learning requires labeled data, while unsupervised learning does not.
Supervised learning predicts labels, while unsupervised learning discovers patterns.
Supervised learning is used for classification, while unsupervised learning is used for regression.
Supervised learning is always more accurate than unsupervised learning.

questions.questionText: Which type of machine learning algorithm falls under unsupervised learning?

options: It is particularly prone to overfitting on noisy datasets
Complexity of the weak learner is important in AdaBoost
It is generally more prone to overfitting

options: It is a supervised learning algorithm
It is an unsupervised learning algorithm
More random algorithms can be used to produce a stronger ensemble
Ensembles can represent more flexible functions

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements is true about stochastic gradient descent?
options: It processes one training example per iteration
It is not preferred for large datasets
It processes all examples per iteration
It is computationally expensive for large datasets

questions.questionText: Decision tree uses the inductive learning approach.

options: It trains next learner on previous mistakes

What is overfitting?
options: Model performs well on training but poorly on test data

questions.questionText: What is overfitting in Machine Learning?
options: Model performs well on training data but poorly on test data
Model performs poorly on both training and test data
Model works only on new data

options: Data used to test the model
Data used to train the model
Data used to validate the model
Data used to deploy the model
